tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their work today due to a personal conflict, which directly conflicts with my plan to finish my own share this afternoon.

goals.description: Complete my share of the group project
goals.rationale: Deadline is today (Mon 19:00) and progress is already at 1.0, indicating it requires immediate finalization or submission before any other tasks.

agent.last_reasoning: This addresses the high-priority goal of finishing my own project by 19:00 without adding extra hours. It manages the cross-domain side effect of relationship dynamics by setting a clear boundary before accepting the dumped task, preventing future resentment while maintaining trust through direct communication.
